last_assistant_message:
## Report

**Status:** Complete. Task 3.6 landed cleanly.

**Files modified:**
- `C:\work\mega\astramemory-plugin\.mcp.json`
- `C:\work\mega\astramemory-plugin\.env.local`
- `C:\work\mega\astramemory-plugin\.env.azuredev`

**jq output:** Valid JSON, `Authorization` header is exactly `"Bearer ${MEMORY_BEARER}"`.

**Test output:** 20/20 pass (0 fail, ~14s).

**Commit SHA:** `9c6ceae0387e4b4efb7f1992eae213585b6a79b7` on `feat/transcript-ingest`. Touched exactly 3 files (+25 / -14).

**Self-review:**
- `.mcp.json` valid JSON, Bearer (proper casing) with `${MEMORY_BEARER}`.
- `grep MEMORY_API_KEY .env.local .env.azuredev` returns no matches (confirmed via Grep tool).
- All new env vars present in both `.env.*`: `MEMORY_INGEST_RETRIES`, `MEMORY_INGEST_RETRY_SLEEP`, `MEMORY_PRECOMPACT_MAX_TURNS`, `MEMORY_PRECOMPACT_MAX_CHARS`, `MEMORY_SESSION_MAX_TURNS`, `MEMORY_SESSION_MAX_CHARS`, `MEMORY_SUBAGENT_MAX_TURNS`, `MEMORY_SUBAGENT_MAX_CHARS`.
- Test suite green; commit limited to 3 files.

**Content drift notes (intentional, replacement is canonical per task spec):**
- Pre-edit `.mcp.json` used `ApiKey ${MEMORY_API_KEY}` — replaced as planned.
- Pre-edit `.env.local` had no `MEMORY_API_KEY` line (already Bearer-only) and referenced `src/MemoryService.AppHost`. Replacement updates the comment to `src/AstraMemory.AppHost` and simplifies the auth comment block (drops the M2 / "MEMORY_API_KEY intentionally absent" notes). All new ingest/limit vars added.
- Pre-edit `.env.azuredev` had no `MEMORY_API_KEY` line either. Replacement strips the longer YARP/AuthorizationPolicy comment block — the task's canonical content keeps only a single header comment. Ingest/limit vars added.
- No keys silently lost; the only `MEMORY_API_KEY` reference was in `.mcp.json` (the actual purpose of this task).

Local CRLF warnings appeared on all three files (Windows checkout, LF source); Git normalized on commit — cosmetic only.
